# VNDB App

[中文](./README.md)

## Some code is generated by AI.

A Flutter client for [VNDB](https://vndb.org/) (Visual Novel Database), replicating the website functionality with a modern Material Design 3 interface.

## Features

- **Home Page** - Latest releases, random VN, and recent changes
- **VN Details** - Full information including developers, publishers, tags, characters, staff, screenshots, and releases
- **Producers** - Tap developers/publishers to view their detail pages
- **Staff Categorization** - View staff organized by role (Scenario, Artist, Composer, Vocals, etc.)
- **Collapsible Sections** - Staff and Releases sections can be expanded/collapsed
- **Staff Credits** - View all VNs a staff member has worked on
- **User List** - Manage your VN collection with All/Votes/Wishlist tabs
- **Search** - Search within your user list
- **M3 Design** - Material Design 3 with customizable accent color
- **Language Switching** - Support for Simplified Chinese and English
- **Dark Mode** - Automatic system theme detection

## Tech Stack

- **Framework**: Flutter 3.x
- **State Management**: Riverpod 2
- **Routing**: Go Router
- **Networking**: Dio
- **Image Caching**: Cached Network Image
- **Localization**: Flutter Localizations
- **Secure Storage**: Flutter Secure Storage
- **In-App Browser**: Flutter InAppWebView

## Getting Started

### Prerequisites

- Flutter SDK >= 3.0.0
- Android SDK (for Android development)
- A VNDB account (for authenticated features)

### Installation

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/your-username/vndb_app.git
cd vndb_app

# Install dependencies
flutter pub get

# Build the app
flutter build apk --release --split-per-abi
```

### Running

```bash
# Development mode
flutter run

# Release mode (Android)
flutter run --release
```

## API Usage

This app uses the [VNDB Kana API](https://api.vndb.org/kana) to fetch data. Authentication is handled via API key stored securely on the device.

## Project Structure

```
lib/
├── core/                  # Core functionality
│   ├── api/               # VNDB API client and endpoints
│   ├── models/            # Data models
│   ├── providers/         # Riverpod providers
│   ├── router/            # Go Router configuration
│   ├── theme/             # App theme configuration
│   └── l10n/              # Localization strings
├── features/              # Feature modules
│   ├── home/              # Home page
│   ├── vn_detail/         # VN detail page
│   ├── lists/             # User list page
│   ├── staff/             # Staff pages
│   ├── producers/         # Producer pages
│   ├── characters/        # Character pages
│   ├── tags/              # Tag pages
│   ├── search/            # Search page
│   ├── settings/          # Settings page
│   └── login/             # Login page
├── widgets/               # Reusable widgets
├── app.dart               # Root app widget
└── main.dart              # Entry point
```

- Thanks to [VNDB Kana API](https://api.vndb.org/kana) for providing the API documentation
